title: Automatic Potato Peeling Machine
description: Rotating abrasive drum peeler for batch potato peeling: motor-driven drum with carborundum lining, water spray, and timer-controlled 3-minute cycle for 2 kg batches.
objective: Peel 2 kg potatoes per 3 min cycle; abrasive drum removes skin with minimal waste; water spray flush; automatic timer stop.
constraints: 230 V 500 W motor; stainless drum 300 mm dia; BOM < ₹4000; Arduino Uno timer.
supporting_fact_titles: Deep-Fry Immersion Heating — Oil Temperature Control
design_element_titles: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Abrasive Drum Food-Peeling Mechanism: 300 mm drum with carborundum lining; water spray nozzle; 60 RPM for 3 min cycle.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Controls timer relay and water solenoid.
